## Source: ossf-package-analysis (58e829a595050f4922bb0937c2d6c0d2759059af987ceb38f0c33712345eadc2)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-merge-queue-go-mergequeuemonolith' @ 1.0.2 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
